login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to CV Bot

hero.titleLine1: Create an AI CV Chatbot for Your Resume
hero.description: Stand out to recruiters with an interactive AI assistant trained on your skills and experience. Land your dream job faster.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From Resume to Recruiter-Ready AI in Minutes
howItWorks.description: Our streamlined process makes it effortless to launch your personalized career chatbot.

step1.title: Upload your CV
step1.description: Simply drag and drop your existing resume or LinkedIn profile. Our platform securely accepts multiple file formats.
features: PDF, DOCX, or plain text files

step2.title: Answer your personalized Questions
step2.description: Get a tailored set of questions based on your CV, skills, and career goals to help your AI chatbot sound more accurate and professional.
features: Crafted uniquely from your uploaded CV
Enhances the chatbot’s accuracy and personality

step3.title: CV AI Bot Creating
step3.description: Our advanced AI platform takes your resume, skills, and experience to create a conversational AI bot that truly understands you.
features: Fast, accurate, and ready in 15 minutes

step4.title: Share with Recruiters
step4.description: Easily share your AI-powered CV chatbot with hiring managers through a short link or QR code for faster, smarter evaluations.
features: Send a short link or QR instantly
Make your profile stand out during screening
Allow recruiters to chat and explore your experience anytime

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Choose a plan that fits your career goals. No hidden fees.

whyPlatform.title: Why Our Platform?
whyPlatform.description: Gain a competitive edge in your job search with powerful AI features.

features.title: Recruiters get instant answers
features.description:
Provide immediate, detailed 
 responses to recruiter questions 24/7.

features.title: Improves hiring chances
features.description:
Stand out from traditional resumes with an 
 interactive and memorable format.

features.title: Saves time preparing for applications
features.description:
Your chatbot acts as a perfect 
 summary of your skills and experience.

features.title: AI supports Arabic & English
features.description:
Cater to both local and international 
 recruiters seamlessly.

features.title: Exportable chatbot link & QR
features.description:
Easily share your chatbot on business 
 cards, email signatures, and social profiles.

features.title: CV Bot Performance Metrics
features.description: See how many recruiters viewed or interacted with your chatbot, giving insights into your performance.

cta.title: Ready to Land Your Dream Job?
cta.description: Create your AI-powered resume chatbot today and impress recruiters with an interactive experience they'll never forget.

rightPanel.headline: Recruiters don't just read your CV.. they talk to it
rightPanel.subheadline: An AI chatbot trained on your resume answers recruiter questions instantly, anytime
rightPanel.chatGreeting: Hi! I'm an AI assistant trained on this professional's resume. Feel free to ask me anything!
rightPanel.chatBotResponse: Based on the resume, I have strong expertise in React, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web development. I specialize in building scalable applications with clean architecture.
